name: Wagon Wheels W/Sun-Dried Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh oregano, or 1 teaspoon dried oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonstick skillet, sauté onion in hot oil until soft.
2. Meanwhile, mince garlic using a food processor with the feed tube.
3. Combine half of the tap water and sun-dried tomatoes in the food processor, then process to puree the tomatoes.
4. Add the remaining tap water to combine.
5. Pour the tomato mixture into the skillet and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until slightly thickened.
6. Stir in parsley, oregano, and lemon juice. Continue simmering over low heat.
7. Serve drained pasta with the tomato sauce, sprinkled with Parmigiano Reggiano.
